name: Merito Fundo E Acoes Imobiliarias Fii - Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario
summary: Merito Fundo E Acoes Imobiliarias Fii - Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario is a Brazilian real estate investment fund (FII). The fund invests in a portfolio of real estate assets, aiming to generate income for its investors through rent and capital appreciation. The fund operates in Brazil.
